title: PixelBlood
description: ⚔️ What's the point if you don't have a little blood on your server? ⚔️
body:
PixelBlood

Do You Feel Like there Is Something Missing From Your Minecraft Server?
Not Getting enough Thrill From Your Kill?

Then Come On Up And Grab Your Copy Of PixelBlood!
A New Plugin That Adds Blood To Your Hack And
Slash Sessions.



Cmds/Perms:
[SPOILER="Commands and Permissions"]Commands:
- /pb reload - Reloads Config
- /pb player - Toggles Player Blood
- /pb passive - Toggles Passive Mob Blood
- /pb neutral - Toggles Neutral Mob Blood
- /pb hostile - Toggles Hostile Mob Blood
- /pb spray - Toggle Blood Spray On Death
- /pb boss - Toggles Boss Blood
- /pb gui - Opens A Gui Menu

Permissions:
- pb.reload
- pb.toggle
- pb.heal


- Ability To Enable/Disable Blood
- Ability To Change BloodEffect Of Mobs
- Ability To Toggle Blood Effects

Dependancy:
None

Full Wiki Page:
https://github.com/MythicGhoul/PixelBlood/wiki

Servers Using PixelBlood:
ogvampirepve.minehut.gg

For support don't hesitate to join my
discord server: https://discord.gg/HxMp5ejvKU


DISCLAIMER
You are not to redistribute the plugin as your own
You are not to sell the plugin
You re not to decompile the plugin


Any Tips and Ideas are very welcome!
